API_ERRORS.VALIDATION_ERROR: One or more validation errors occurred.
API_ERRORS.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
API_ERRORS.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
API_ERRORS.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
API_ERRORS.CONFLICT: The request could not be completed because of a conflict.
API_ERRORS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
API_ERRORS.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Your account was locked after repeated failed attempts. Contact an administrator to reactivate it.
API_ERRORS.OTP_EXPIRED: OTP verification expired. Sign in again.
API_ERRORS.OTP_INVALID: The OTP code is invalid. Check the 6 digits and try again.
API_ERRORS.OTP_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: The OTP code is invalid or expired.
API_ERRORS.SESSION_INVALID: The session is expired or invalid.
API_ERRORS.PASSWORD_RECOVERY_INVALID: The password recovery link is invalid or expired.

LOGIN.TAGLINE_SUB: A modern platform for tracking and resolving cases.
LOGIN.TITLE: Sign in
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Enter your credentials to access
LOGIN.OTP_SUBTITLE: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
LOGIN.OTP_HELP: For security, this sign-in requires your second factor before entering the system.
LOGIN.OTP_SETUP_HELP: An administrator enabled OTP for your account. Scan the QR or register the manual key and then enter your first 6-digit code.
LOGIN.OTP_SCAN_HINT: Scan this code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or any compatible app.
LOGIN.RECOVERY_SENT: We sent a password reset link to the provided email address.
LOGIN.RECOVERY_EMAIL_REQUIRED: Enter a valid email so we can send the recovery link.
LOGIN.ERROR_INVALID_OTP: The OTP code is invalid. Check the 6 digits and try again.
LOGIN.ERROR_OTP_SETUP_REQUIRED: Your account must finish OTP setup before you can sign in. Use the activation or recovery link.
LOGIN.ERROR_NETWORK: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Set your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Create a secure password for your account
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_SETUP_HINT: Register this account in your authenticator app and enter the first 6-digit OTP code to confirm enrollment.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_VERIFY_HINT: To reset your password you must confirm your 6-digit OTP code.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_KEY: Manual key for the authenticator app
RESET_PASSWORD.REDIRECT: You will be redirected to login in a few seconds...
RESET_PASSWORD.INVALID_LINK: The link is invalid or has expired.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR: An error occurred. Please request a new link.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_ERROR: We could not validate the OTP. Check your authenticator app and try again.

AUTH_SESSIONS.DETAIL_ERROR: Could not load the session details.

DETAIL.HINT: Select a row to inspect technical metadata and recorded events.
DETAIL.EMPTY: Select a session to inspect its traceability.

MAP.TITLE: Session map
MAP.SUBTITLE: Browser coordinates are preferred when available; otherwise the backend IP-based approximation is shown.

EVENTS.TITLE: Session events
EVENTS.EMPTY: This session has no recorded events yet.

MESSAGE.OTP_CHALLENGE_CREATED: OTP challenge created for the session.
MESSAGE.FINGERPRINT_CHANGED_DURING_SESSION: Fingerprint change detected during the session.
MESSAGE.IP_CHANGED_DURING_SESSION: IP address change detected during the session.
MESSAGE.SESSION_REVOKED_BY_ADMIN: Session revoked from the administrative console.
MESSAGE.SESSION_ENDED_BY_USER_LOGOUT: Session ended because the user logged out.
MESSAGE.SESSION_ENDED_BY_COOKIE_EXPIRED: Session ended because the cookie expired.
MESSAGE.SESSION_ENDED_BY_HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT: Session ended because the heartbeat timed out.
MESSAGE.SESSION_ENDED_BY_OTP_NOT_COMPLETED: Session ended because OTP was not completed.
MESSAGE.SESSION_ENDED_BY_BROWSER_CLOSED_ASSUMED: Session ended because the browser was assumed closed.

ACTIONS.REVOKE_ERROR: Could not revoke the selected session.
ACTIONS.REVOKE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will immediately terminate {{user}}'s session on {{device}}. This action cannot be undone.
